block.text: This is a fatal error. Minutes later, you are trapped in a dead-end corridor by dozens of hungermaddened laboratory animals, many of which are mutations—a most embarrassing end for a hero... ne College of War is easy to find; it is a huge five-sided building built all of brick. If you have been here before, turn to 332. If you have not been here before, keep reading. A robot of unfamiliar design is standing in front of the building. You recognize it as a Karossean military robot. What will you do: Turn to 46 Attack immedia tely? Try to pass as one of the invaders? Turn to 87 Leave before you are noticed? Turn to 147

choice.text: If you have been here before.
. If you have not been here before, keep reading. A robot of unfamiliar design is standing in front of the building. You recognize it as a Karossean military robot. What will you do.
Attack immedia tely? Try to pass as one of the invaders?
